TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = pin-ni-si-lin Áõ§ŚįľŤ•Ņśěó / cin-mey-su ťĚíťĽīÁī† = 928 a mihcaan ci Bow-lay-min i Lon-tun talakaway a cacudadan musakamu tu bayking, itayaw ci Bow-lay-min misulit tu sakay cacay pakayniay badisusu'cilcay pisuzikuz misulit tu nigingkiwan, i pitanengan yadah ku nipahabay tu kim kulitana badisusu'cilkay "S. aureus", 7 a bulad tu zikuz mey-cin tabu mahetik tini pipahabayan, 8 a bulan ci Bow-la-min a tademawan i inak misalihalay mihibang, 9 a bulad panukas taluma' pitanengan. mahini ci Bow-lay-min maazih niza silangaw matumes nu bayking ku pipahabayan i kalimucu' sicin-mey-cin, liwliw nayi' ku mulangaway nu bayking, ci Bow-lay-min kasenun mazateng ku mey-cin taneng a mipatay tu bayking, kuyni mahiniay musakamu i 1929 a mihcaan nu Ing-kow pitanengan patahkal tu migingkiway tu imelang. zikuz yadah ku nisanga'an niza aca tu malecaday nitanengan, kilul malikeluh tu bunday, hicaen misanga' ku mahiniay pan-ni-si-lin, cangu'ut kuyni a gizice, acaay kalalid sa miazih migingkiw, kilul katahkal nu hwang-an a sapayu,, tademaw amin sakay cn-mey-su anipakatineng caay kanamuh. 1935 a mihcaan Ing-kow niw-cin talakaway cacudadan migingkiway tu imelang ci-zen ci Bow-low-li atu miliwkuay i Ing-koway Te-kow migingkiway ci Cyen-en makakadum, migingkiw tu kapahay a cin-mey-su, malaliyas atu macacayatay a hwa-sey, palasawad tu cin-meysu pisanga' a bunday. zikuz saayaway ni Bow-low-li a migikiway a sakaput makay cin-mey-cinan miala patahkal tu kang-sen-su-pan-ni-si-lin "singangan aca tu cin-mey-su", Niw-cin migingkiway cu-zen ci Ha-li-s "Henry Harris" namusakamu, "inayi' ci Bow-lay-min, caay ka izaw ci Cyen-en, nayi' ci Cyen-en, cayay ka izaw ci Bow-low-li, inayi' ci Bow-loe-li, cayay ka izaw ci Si-te-li, inayi' ci Si-te-lix, ainayi' ku pan-ni-si-lin." 1941 a mihcaan saayaway a tademaw mikinsaay tu cin-mey-su, maazih ku cin-mey-su, hamin masumad tu ku tademaw atu milaliday a imelangan malalebu tu patay a likisi, palalecad tu nikauzip nu tademaw amanayatu, namahiza ci Bow-lay-min ci Cyen-en atu ci Bow-loe-li mapulung pakalal tu 1945 a mihcaan tu Now-pey-al-i-sye a kawlah.
S.PHON: = pin-ni-si-r~…ĺin **** / ¶in-m…ô-su *** = *** a mińß ¶aan ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min i r~…ĺon-tun tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan musakamu tu bajkiŇč, itajaw ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min misur~…ĺit tu sakaj ¶a ¶aj pakajniaj badisusu Ē~ ° ¶ir~…ĺ ¶aj pisuzikuz misur~…ĺit tu nigiŇčkiwan, i pitan…ôŇčan jadańß ku nipańßabaj tu kim kur~…ĺitana badisusu Ē~ ° ¶ir~…ĺkaj "s. aur…ôus", * a bur~…ĺad tu zikuz m…ô- ¶in tabu mańß…ôtik tini pipańßabajan, * a bur~…ĺan ¶i bow-r~…ĺa-min a tad…ômawan i inak misar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj mińßibaŇč, * a bur~…ĺad panukas tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° pitan…ôŇčan. mańßini ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min maazińß niza sir~…ĺaŇčaw matum…ôs nu bajkiŇč ku pipańßabajan i kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° si ¶in-m…ô- ¶in, r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw naji Ē~ ° ku mur~…ĺaŇčawaj nu bajkiŇč, ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min kas…ônun mazat…ôŇč ku m…ô- ¶in tan…ôŇč a mipataj tu bajkiŇč, kujni mańßiniaj musakamu i **** a mińß ¶aan nu iŇč-kow pitan…ôŇčan patańßkar~…ĺ tu migiŇčkiwaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. zikuz jadańß ku nisaŇča Ē~ °an niza a ¶a tu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj nitan…ôŇčan, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ mar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß tu bundaj, ńßi ¶a…ôn misaŇča Ē~ ° ku mańßiniaj pan-ni-si-r~…ĺin, ¶aŇču Ē~ °ut kujni a gizi ¶…ô, a ¶aaj kar~…ĺar~…ĺid sa miazińß migiŇčkiw, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ katańßkar~…ĺ nu ńßwaŇč-an a sapaju,, tad…ômaw amin sakaj ¶n-m…ô-su anipakatin…ôŇč ¶aaj kanamuńß. **** a mińß ¶aan iŇč-kow niw- ¶in tar~…ĺakawaj ¶a ¶udadan migiŇčkiwaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶i-z…ôn ¶i bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺi atu mir~…ĺiwkuaj i iŇč-kowaj t…ô-kow migiŇčkiwaj ¶i ¶j…ôn-…ôn makakadum, migiŇčkiw tu kapańßaj a ¶in-m…ô-su, mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas atu ma ¶a ¶ajataj a ńßwa-s…ô, par~…ĺasawad tu ¶in-m…ôsu pisaŇča Ē~ ° a bundaj. zikuz saajawaj ni bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺi a migikiwaj a sakaput makaj ¶in-m…ô- ¶inan miar~…ĺa patańßkar~…ĺ tu kaŇč-s…ôn-su-pan-ni-si-r~…ĺin "siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu ¶in-m…ô-su", niw- ¶in migiŇčkiwaj ¶u-z…ôn ¶i ńßa-r~…ĺi-s "ńß…ônrj ńßarris" namusakamu, "inaji Ē~ ° ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min, ¶aaj ka izaw ¶i ¶j…ôn-…ôn, naji Ē~ ° ¶i ¶j…ôn-…ôn, ¶ajaj ka izaw ¶i bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺi, inaji Ē~ ° ¶i bow-r~…ĺo…ô-r~…ĺi, ¶ajaj ka izaw ¶i si-t…ô-r~…ĺi, inaji Ē~ ° ¶i si-t…ô-r~…ĺi*, ainaji Ē~ ° ku pan-ni-si-r~…ĺin." **** a mińß ¶aan saajawaj a tad…ômaw mikinsaaj tu ¶in-m…ô-su, maazińß ku ¶in-m…ô-su, ńßamin masumad tu ku tad…ômaw atu mir~…ĺar~…ĺidaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu tu pataj a r~…ĺikisi, par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu nikauzip nu tad…ômaw amanajatu, namańßiza ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min ¶i ¶j…ôn-…ôn atu ¶i bow-r~…ĺo…ô-r~…ĺi mapur~…ĺuŇč pakar~…ĺar~…ĺ tu **** a mińß ¶aan tu now-p…ô-ar~…ĺ-i-sj…ô a kawr~…ĺańß.
S.FORM: = pin-ni-si-lin Áõ§ŚįľŤ•Ņśěó / cin-mey-su ťĚíťĽīÁī† = 928 a mihcaan ci Bow-lay-min i Lon-tun talakaway a cacudadan musakamu tu bayking, itayaw ci Bow-lay-min misulit tu sakay cacay pakayniay badisusu'cilcay pisuzikuz misulit tu nigingkiwan, i pitanengan yadah ku nipahabay tu kim kulitana badisusu'cilkay "S. aureus", 7 a bulad tu zikuz mey-cin tabu mahetik tini pipahabayan, 8 a bulan ci Bow-la-min a tademawan i inak misalihalay mihibang, 9 a bulad panukas taluma' pitanengan. mahini ci Bow-lay-min maazih niza silangaw matumes nu bayking ku pipahabayan i kalimucu' sicin-mey-cin, liwliw nayi' ku mulangaway nu bayking, ci Bow-lay-min kasenun mazateng ku mey-cin taneng a mipatay tu bayking, kuyni mahiniay musakamu i 1929 a mihcaan nu Ing-kow pitanengan patahkal tu migingkiway tu imelang. zikuz yadah ku nisanga'an niza aca tu malecaday nitanengan, kilul malikeluh tu bunday, hicaen misanga' ku mahiniay pan-ni-si-lin, cangu'ut kuyni a gizice, acaay kalalid sa miazih migingkiw, kilul katahkal nu hwang-an a sapayu,, tademaw amin sakay cn-mey-su anipakatineng caay kanamuh. 1935 a mihcaan Ing-kow niw-cin talakaway cacudadan migingkiway tu imelang ci-zen ci Bow-low-li atu miliwkuay i Ing-koway Te-kow migingkiway ci Cyen-en makakadum, migingkiw tu kapahay a cin-mey-su, malaliyas atu macacayatay a hwa-sey, palasawad tu cin-meysu pisanga' a bunday. zikuz saayaway ni Bow-low-li a migikiway a sakaput makay cin-mey-cinan miala patahkal tu kang-sen-su-pan-ni-si-lin "singangan aca tu cin-mey-su", Niw-cin migingkiway cu-zen ci Ha-li-s "Henry Harris" namusakamu, "inayi' ci Bow-lay-min, caay ka izaw ci Cyen-en, nayi' ci Cyen-en, cayay ka izaw ci Bow-low-li, inayi' ci Bow-loe-li, cayay ka izaw ci Si-te-li, inayi' ci Si-te-lix, ainayi' ku pan-ni-si-lin." 1941 a mihcaan saayaway a tademaw mikinsaay tu cin-mey-su, maazih ku cin-mey-su, hamin masumad tu ku tademaw atu milaliday a imelangan malalebu tu patay a likisi, palalecad tu nikauzip nu tademaw amanayatu, namahiza ci Bow-lay-min ci Cyen-en atu ci Bow-loe-li mapulung pakalal tu 1945 a mihcaan tu Now-pey-al-i-sye a kawlah.

pakajniaj badisusu Ē~ ° ¶ir~…ĺ ¶aj pisuzikuz misur~…ĺit tu nigiŇčkiwan, i pitan…ôŇčan jadańß ku nipańßabaj tu kim kur~…ĺitana badisusu Ē~ ° ¶ir~…ĺkaj "s. aur…ôus", * a bur~…ĺad tu zikuz m…ô- ¶in tabu mańß…ôtik tini pipańßabajan, * a bur~…ĺan ¶i bow-r~…ĺa-min a tad…ômawan i inak misar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj mińßibaŇč, * a bur~…ĺad panukas tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° pitan…ôŇčan. mańßini ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min maazińß niza katańßkar~…ĺ nu ńßwaŇč-an a sapaju,, tad…ômaw amin sakaj ¶n-m…ô-su anipakatin…ôŇč ¶aaj kanamuńß. **** a mińß ¶aan iŇč-kow niw- ¶in tar~…ĺakawaj ¶a ¶udadan migiŇčkiwaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶i-z…ôn ¶i bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺi atu mir~…ĺiwkuaj i iŇč-kowaj t…ô-kow migiŇčkiwaj ¶i ¶j…ôn-…ôn makakadum, migiŇčkiw tu kapańßaj a ¶in-m…ô-su, mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas atu ma ¶a ¶ajataj a ńßwa-s…ô, par~…ĺasawad tu ¶in-m…ôsu pisaŇča Ē~ ° a bundaj. zikuz saajawaj ni bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺi a migikiwaj a sakaput makaj ¶in-m…ô- ¶inan miar~…ĺa patańßkar~…ĺ tu kaŇč-s…ôn-su-pan-ni-si-r~…ĺin "siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu ¶in-m…ô-su", niw- ¶in migiŇčkiwaj ¶u-z…ôn ¶i ńßa-r~…ĺi-s "ńß…ônrj ńßarris" namusakamu, "inaji Ē~ ° ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min, ¶aaj ka izaw ¶i ¶j…ôn-…ôn, naji Ē~ ° ¶i ¶j…ôn-…ôn, ¶ajaj ka izaw ¶i bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺi, inaji Ē~ ° ¶i bow-r~…ĺo…ô-r~…ĺi, ¶ajaj ka izaw ¶i si-t…ô-r~…ĺi, inaji Ē~ ° ¶i si-t…ô-r~…ĺi*, ainaji Ē~ ° ku pan-ni-si-r~…ĺin." **** a mińß ¶aan saajawaj a tad…ômaw mikinsaaj tu ¶in-m…ô-su, maazińß ku ¶in-m…ô-su, ńßamin masumad tu ku tad…ômaw atu mir~…ĺar~…ĺidaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu tu pataj a r~…ĺikisi, par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu nikauzip nu tad…ômaw amanajatu, namańßiza ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min ¶i ¶j…ôn-…ôn atu ¶i bow-r~…ĺo…ô-r~…ĺi mapur~…ĺuŇč pakar~…ĺar~…ĺ tu **** a mińß ¶aan tu now-p…ô-ar~…ĺ-i-sj…ô a kawr~…ĺańß.
